name: Lemonway API
description: Lemonway Payment Platform API for account management, money-in/money-out operations, P2P transfers, and payment processing. Supports multiple payment methods including cards, bank transfers, PayPal, SEPA direct debits, and includes KYC/AML compliance automation.
